description: Convert the quarterly US GDP dataset 'usa.gdt' (~/Documents/gretl_data/) to an annual frequency for the period 1984-2008 using the 'Average' method. Calculate the annual percentage growth rate of Real GDP as a new variable named 'gdp_growth' using the formula 100 * (ln(gdp) - ln(gdp(-1))). Export the annual dataset, including 'gdp', 'inf', and 'gdp_growth', to ~/Documents/gretl_output/usa_annual.csv.
